subjects.name: English F 6
subjects.content:
# Australian Curriculum Version 9: English Foundation to Year 6
## Complete Reference Document

---

## 1. Curriculum Overview

### 1.1 Structure

The Australian Curriculum v9 (AC v9) for English is structured around three strands:

| Strand | Abbreviation | Focus |
|--------|-------------|-------|
| Language | LA | Understanding the English language system -- how words and sentences work |
| Literature | LE | Engaging with, analysing, and creating literary texts |
| Literacy | LY | Applying English knowledge to comprehending and composing texts across all learning areas |

**Content Descriptor Code Format:** `AC9EXXZYY`
- `AC9` = Australian Curriculum Version 9
- `E` = English
- `XX` = Strand identifier
  - `FLA`, `1LA`, `2LA` etc. = Language (Foundation, Year 1, Year 2...)
  - `FLE`, `1LE`, `2LE` etc. = Literature
  - `FLY`, `1LY`, `2LY` etc. = Literacy
- `YY` = Descriptor number (two digits)

**Language Modes** (integrated within all strands):
- Listening, Speaking, Reading, Viewing

subjects.name: Maths F 6
subjects.content:
# Australian Curriculum v9 — Mathematics F–6
**Subject:** Mathematics | **Scope:** Foundation to Year 6
**Saved:** 2026-04-20 | **Status:** BUILDING

---

## STRUCTURE OVERVIEW

The Australian Curriculum v9 Mathematics is organised into six strands:
- **Number** (AC9N) — Counting, place value, operations, mental computation
- **Algebra** (AC9A) — Patterns, relationships, equations
- **Measurement** (AC9M) — Length, area, volume, mass, time, money
- **Space** (AC9S) — 2D shapes, 3D objects, geometric reasoning
- **Statistics** (AC9ST) — Data collection, representation, analysis
- **Probability** (AC9P) — Chance experiments, likelihood

Integrated with:
- **General Capabilities:** Literacy, Numeracy, ICT Capability, Critical and Creative Thinking, Personal and Social Capability, Ethical Understanding, Intercultural Understanding
- **Cross-Curriculum Priorities:** Sustainability, Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Histories and Cultures, Asia and Australia's Engagement with Asia

---
